ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that he needed a short continuance and that he should be able to file a report this week. Status on close of the Estate is continued to May 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-24-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Continued To Apr-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court will issue an Order to Appear to the Attorney to appear on April 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and an order to file a Petition for Final Distribution no later than April 17, 2017. The status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Moret. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: StevenA. Weinkauf for the Public Administrator.

The Court stated that Petitioner Laura Brockwehl has filed a Petition for Letters of Administration, but that it was clear the Public Administrator has priority. The Court ordered that the Public Administrator be appointed as Administrator of the Estate of Hildegard Offermann, subject to receipt of written order. The Court set a Status Hearing re Closing of Estate for April 3, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
